description: Svelte workbench change that adds an inspector mode toggle and reorganizes patch rendering.

files.summary: Adds diff review session state, analysis polling, and hunk-jump wiring.
Adds keyboard navigation, file list progress, and unified hunks.

expectedSignals: Calls out that the change is UI-heavy and improves review flow rather than chat behavior.
Names inspector state, whitespace toggling, or hunk jumping as affected behavior.
Flags keyboard navigation or state synchronization as a place to inspect.
